# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# Lean image for the WIKI DEMO — serves the committed MkDocs site only.
#
# Deliberately tiny: only mkdocs-material (no presidio / pandas / qdrant / spaCy / streamlit),
# so it builds fast and hosts cheap for a reviewer. The beefy Dockerfile powers rag-live and
# wiki-live (ingest + render + serve); this image only serves the committed mkdocs/ pages.
FROM python:3.12-slim

ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    UV_LINK_MODE=copy \
    UV_COMPILE_BYTECODE=1

COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /uvx /bin/
WORKDIR /app

# Lean deps only (the wiki group of a minimal pyproject = mkdocs-material).
COPY mkdocs/pyproject.toml ./pyproject.toml
RUN uv sync --group wiki --no-install-project

# The committed site + the serve entrypoint. No src/, no operational store, no model.
COPY mkdocs ./mkdocs
COPY scripts/run_wiki.sh ./scripts/run_wiki.sh

ENV UV_NO_SYNC=1 \
    WIKI_VIEW_PORT=8001 \
    PIPELINE_MODE=mock
EXPOSE 8001

ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "scripts/run_wiki.sh"]
